nodes.label: AI as time-saving analytical tool
nodes.grounding_span: Having AI search for keywords reduced the time I would have taken to read the papers

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes I have found that it makes up research (even with citations)

nodes.label: AI for connecting existing research
nodes.grounding_span: I will stick to having it help me make connections/analyze already published papers

nodes.label: Personal judgment in defining research focus
nodes.grounding_span: I did not use AI to generate my list of research ideas because it is what interests me and where my personal strengths lie

nodes.label: Research efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: reduced the time I would have taken to read the papers

nodes.label: Epistemic trust and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I would go to the bibliography in the paper, find the research title, look for it online and read it

nodes.label: Personal intellectual ownership
nodes.grounding_span: it is what interests me and where my personal strengths lie that will help me determine my statement

nodes.label: Novel contribution to science
nodes.grounding_span: be more confident that I am conducting a study on a topic that is not already well-studied

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI as helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool that can be helpful, and it should be embraced as such

nodes.label: Caution due to AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: I am cautious about using it because sometimes I have found that it makes up research

nodes.label: Preference for AI in analysis over idea generation
nodes.grounding_span: I will stick to having it help me make connections/analyze already published papers

nodes.label: Verification-oriented systematic checking
nodes.grounding_span: I would go to the bibliography in the paper, find the research title, look for it online and read it

nodes.label: Domain boundary setting between personal judgment and AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I did not use AI to generate my list of research ideas because it is what interests me
